name: Chinese Beef Jerky
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Flank steak - or London broil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat in half lengthwise and slice diagonally crosswise into paper-thin strips 1-1/2 to 2 inches wide and 4 inches long.
2. Transfer the sliced meat to a shallow pan.
3. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
4. Rub the marinade thoroughly onto the meat pieces.
5. Arrange the marinated meat on racks so they are in a single layer.
6. Let the meat dry at room temperature overnight (do not refrigerate).
7. Preheat the oven to 250°F.
8. Line two large baking sheets with foil and place wire racks on top.
9. Arrange the meat on the racks in a single layer.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Reduce the oven temperature to 175°F and continue drying for another 40 minutes (until the meat is lightly browned but not burned).
12. Let the meat continue to dry at room temperature overnight before packing into jars.
13. For added flavor and shine, brush the dried meat lightly with sesame oil.
Makes 36 pieces or 10 buffet servings.
